title: Toddler Educational Toys for 1 2 3 Years Old Boys and Girls - 3 Montessori Jigsaw Wooden Puzzles for Kids - Animals Learning Gifts for 2-4 Years Old - Fun Kids Games
features: LEARNING TOYS FOR 2 YEAR OLD: Our wooden puzzles stand out as puzzles for 2 year olds due to fun shapes, detailed images, natural colors & words; They develop eye-hand coordination, fine motor and problem-solving skills, memory of your kids

1 YEAR OLD GIRL BOY GIFTS: Kids toys made of wood is a great gift for 2 years old girls and boys; Puzzle size is 9,84x7,48 inc, each board has 9 educational images on top & underneath which brings more learning value to kids puzzles

SAFE EDUCATIONAL TOYS: You get images printed directly on the wood vs cheap stickers or paper; Scratch- and water-resistant paints will survive any kids' experiment; No more mid-age silk printing/ varnishing of toddler puzzles

STURDY AND PEGLESS: You use durable European plywoods compared to those stuffed with sawdust or glued chipboards that most puzzles are made of; To make long-lasting wooden toys we laser cut grooves beside each piece but not use pegs or knobs

SURPRISE YOUR KIDS: toddler puzzles 2-3 years made of wood match perfectly the indoor & outdoor activity needs; Kids enjoy the time with friends, moms, dads, grannies while playing with modern educational toys by Quokka
description: Product Description Discover nature through play with our Realistic Animals Peg Puzzles! Easy-to-grasp pegs make puzzle solving fun while building observation skills and fine motor development. More than just cute! These Realistic Animal Peg Puzzles help kids match shapes and colors, boosting recognition, focus, and the joy of learning through play. Bring the wild to life with Realistic Animals Peg Puzzles – engaging play that strengthens memory, coordination, and a love for animals. Educational and fun! Realistic Animals Peg Puzzles inspire curiosity, develop problem-solving skills, and make learning hands-on and exciting. Previous page Next page
